messages.message: Invalid sample qualifierLinear for non-linear transfer function in the basic DFD block.
messages.details: DFD block #1 sample #4 qualifierLinear is 0 but for KHR_DF_TRANSFER_DCIP3 and channelId 15 (alpha) it must be 1.

messages.message: Non-conformant texture file accepted by libktx.
messages.details: KTX 2.0 file does not conform to the specification but it is currently accepted by libktx.
